untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calibration of [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters for confirmation_bars, retest_tolerance_percent, and stop_loss_offset_percent. The 'market probing behavior' and 'violent price movement following failed breakouts' concepts require specific threshold values not provided in source material. Entry condition requires distinguishing between normal level violations (probing) vs confirmed breakouts—requires parameter tuning unavailable from source text.
translation_notes: Used pivot levels (s1, r1) as proxies for support/resistance. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long breakouts (above resistance) and short breakouts (below support). Stop loss set conservatively at 2% pending threshold specification. Confirmation logic simplified to 2-bar hold—actual confirmation_bars parameter needed. Entry conditions model: (1) breakout crossing, (2) sustained hold above/below level. Exit on violation back through breakout level as specified.
